La couleur, perception humaine d'un phénomène naturel, la lumière, a suscité de nombreuses constructions théoriques. Les philosophes s'interrogent sur la couleur, propriété de l'objet auquel elle semble attachée, ou concept de la personne qui regarde. body_head: Grafisk design – Wikipedia Hopp til innhold Fra Wikipedia, den frie encyklopedi (Omdirigert fra «Kommunikasjonsdesign») Grunnformer og grunnfarger. Grafisk design eller grafisk formgivning er kunsten å arrangere bilder og tekst for å kommunisere et budskap, og skape forståelse for budskapet. Dette kan utføres på alle medier, som trykksaker, web og andre digitale medier, film og animasjon, produkter og produktemballasje, skilt, logoer, brosjyrer, reklame, bøker o.l. title: 構圖 - 維基百科，自由嘅百科全書
body_head: 構圖 - 維基百科，自由嘅百科全書 跳去內容 出自維基百科，自由嘅百科全書 維梅爾嘅《畫畫嘅藝術》；呢幅畫成日都俾人攞嚟做構圖嘅基本例子。 構圖（粵拼：gau3/kau3 tou4）係視覺藝術上嘅一個概念。一幅視藝作品嘅構圖指嗰幅作品當中唔同物件嘅位置－包括每件物件相對個框嘅位置以及彼此之間嘅相對位置：一幅視藝作品－例如係一幅畫或者一張相－當中會有若干件藝術元素；藝術元素包括咗線、形狀同色水等；每件元素會喺幅作品上有個位置以及相對於第啲元素嘅位置。視藝上對構圖嘅思考就旨在要諗[1][2] 「藝術元素嘅位置要點安排，先可以賦予幅作品結構同埋表達藝術家嘅意圖，造出令人覺得賞心悅目嘅作品。」 以荷蘭畫家維梅爾（Johannes Vermeer）嘅其中一幅出名作品《畫畫嘅藝術》為例，《畫畫嘅藝術》個構圖簡單講如下：圖中有掛毯、畫家同模特兒等嘅多件物件，當中個畫家線條上大致垂直（線），佔嘅空間大致成四方形（形狀），形態係一個坐喺度嘅人（形態），置於塊掛毯之後同個模特兒之前（相對第啲元素嘅位置；塊掛毯將觀眾視線引入個畫家身處空間），離右邊界距離大約係成幅畫闊度嘅 1/3（相對於個框嘅位置）[3]。

Wim Crouwel (1928-2019), co-founder of the first multidisciplinary design agency in the Netherlands, Total Design in 1963, is one of the Dutch best-known designers. title: Web 2.0 - Wikipedia
body_head: Web 2.0 - Wikipedia Vai al contenuto Da Wikipedia, l'enciclopedia libera. Schema di funzionamento di un sito web dinamico In informatica il Web 2.0 è una fase della storia del World Wide Web caratterizzata dall'esistenza di applicazioni web che interagiscono attivamente con l'utente, modificando le informazioni mostrate in base alle informazioni generate da quest'ultimo e ricevute dall'application server (user generated content). Essa seguì la cosiddetta fase del Web 1.0, caratterizzata invece d
body_tail: ione in cui il ruolo dell'utente è centrale. Nel descrivere le caratteristiche del Web 2.0 si procede spesso per confronto con il Web 1.0, indicando come nel passaggio di versione gli elementi fondamentali si siano evoluti o siano stati sostituiti da nuovi. Si tratta dunque di un modo di rappresenta

title: Web 2.0 - Wikipedia
body_head: Web 2.0 - Wikipedia Naar inhoud springen Uit Wikipedia, de vrije encyclopedie Tim O'Reilly bedacht de naam Web 2.0 om een nieuwe fase in het internetgebruik aan te duiden. Andrew Keen Web 2.0 verwijst naar de ontwikkeling van het internet tot een communicatiemiddel, tot een medium met een hoge graad van mens-computerinteractie. Iedere gebruiker kan informatie zowel uploaden als downloaden, iemand hoeft daar geen webmaster voor te zijn. Tim O'Reilly bedacht de naam en noemt voor het moment van de
body_tail: ald als De @-cultuur Meulenhoff, Amsterdam, 2008. Mediabestanden Zie de categorie Web 2.0 van Wikimedia Commons voor mediabestanden over dit onderwerp. Ponuja veliko več, kot je ponujal splet 1.0, ki je
body_tail: oleg tega pa Splet 2.0 označuje širok kulturni pojem. Ustvari namreč novo navado, kjer gre za participacijo uporabnika. title: Web 2.0 – Wikipedia tiếng Việt
body_head: Web 2.0 – Wikipedia tiếng Việt Bước tới nội dung Bách khoa toàn thư mở Wikipedia Web 2.0 (còn được gọi là web tham gia [1] hay web xã hội)[2] cho phép người dùng tương tác và cộng tác với nhau thông qua đối thoại trên phương tiện truyền thông xã hội với tư cách là người tạo nội dung trong cộng đồng ảo. Điều này trái ngược với thế hệ đầu tiên của các trang web Web 1.0, nơi mọi người bị giới hạn xem nội dung một cách thụ động. Ví dụ về Web 2.0 bao gồm các trang web mạng xã hội hoặc các trang truyề
body_tail: cấp thông tin chi tiết về chiến dịch tiếp thị, cũng như giao tiếp trực tuyến thời gian thực với khách hàng. title: Web 2.0
body_head: Web 2.0 Want to start a startup? Get funded by Y Combinator. November 2005 Does "Web 2.0" mean anything? Till recently I thought it didn't, but the truth turns out to be more complicated. Originally, yes, it was meaningless. Now it seems to have acquired a meaning. And yet those who dislike the term are probably right, because if it means what I think it does, we don't need it. title: Minimalisme (art) — Wikipédia
body_head: Minimalisme (art) — Wikipédia Aller au contenu Un article de Wikipédia, l'encyclopédie libre. Minimalisme Carré noir sur fond blanc (1915) de Malevitch, précurseur du vide minimaliste. modifier Pour les articles homonymes, voir Minimalisme. Le minimalisme (ou art minimal) est un mouvement de l'art contemporain, apparu au début des années 1960 aux États-Unis, en réaction au lyrisme pictural de l'expressionnisme abstrait et en opposition à la tendance figurative et ironique du pop art. Le minimali

body_head: A Short History of Minimalism | The Nation Log In January 14, 2020 Today we might describe modernist architecture like Philip Johnson’s or Mies van der Rohe’s as minimalist. But the word has been retrofitted to include such architects just in the past few decades. In the context of art history, the two terms were almost completely separate. body_head: Maximal Nation | Pitchfork Skip to main content Read the reviews for Scottish producer Rustie's Glass Swords, one of the year's great albums, and there's this word that keeps on recurring. *Dummy'*s Chal Ravens hails its "no-genres-barred maximalism," The Wire's Mark Fisher situates the album in an electronic dance counter-tradition of "maximalism" and "managed overload," and Pitchfork's own Jess Harvell refers approvingly to the record's "maximalist zeal." I vardagslivet kan det oftast användas utan krav på definition eller specificering, men för mera specifika ändamål finns flera olika, och delvis motsägande, betydelser av ordet. title: Colors - Wikiquote
body_head: Colors - Wikiquote Jump to content From Wikiquote Color (North American English) or colour (Commonwealth English) is the visual perceptual property corresponding in humans to the categories called red, blue, yellow, etc. Color derives from the spectrum of light (distribution of light power versus wavelength) interacting in the eye with the spectral sensitivities of the light receptors. title: Web color - Simple English Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
body_head: Web color - Simple English Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Jump to content From Simple English Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Web colors are colors used in designing webpages, and the ways for describing and listing those colors. There are several ways to choose colors for parts of webpages. Colors may be listed as an RGB triplet (a set of three numbers, red, green, and blue) in hexadecimal format (a hex triplet, rr, gg, bb). title: Memphis Group - Wikipedia
body_head: Memphis Group - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Italian design collective A collection of objects by the Memphis Group The Memphis Group, also known as Memphis Milano, was an Italian design and architecture group founded by Ettore Sottsass. It was active from 1980 to 1987.[1] The group designed postmodern furniture, lighting, fabrics, carpets, ceramics, glass and metal objects. title: Edito Type
body_head: Edito Type INITIALE Sharp Set Sharp Set Alternate 4 Initiale, a titling typeface revisiting the didone through a generous lens, with an incisive, robust presence. Condensed and precise, it carries the clarity and authority of didone structures while shifting them toward a more grounded and contemporary tone. Its construction relies on controlled proportions, reinforced into solid shapes and punctuated by subtle irregularities that introduce tension and character. Initiale operates through densit

title: تصميم المعلومات - ويكيبيديا
body_head: تصميم المعلومات - ويكيبيديا انتقل إلى المحتوى من ويكيبيديا، الموسوعة الحرة يعد مخطط تشارلز جوزيف مينارد في عام 1861 الخاص بمسيرة نابليون مثالاً قديمًا على مخططات المعلومات البيانية. تصوير لمعدل تواتر القطارات المسافرة من بنغالور بالهند. استنادًا إلى عمل إتيان-جول ماري تصميم المعلومات هو عرض المعلومات بطريقة تعزز استيعابها بشكل فعال، وكان المصطلح يستخدم للإشارة تحديدًا إلى تصميم المخططات البيانية التي تهدف لعرض المعلومات بشكل فعال بدلاً من عرضها بشكل جذاب أو فني فقط، أما اليوم فأصبح لتصميم المعلو

Malha, grid ou grelha, em design gráfico, é uma estrutura geométrica constituída por eixos (comumente horizontais e verticais) desenvolvida para auxiliar o alinhamento de elementos textuais e imagéticos numa composição visual. title: Grid Systems
body_head: Grid Systems What is a grid system? There is nothing worse for an artist than a blank canvas. A grid system is a set of measurements a graphic designer can use to align and size objects within the given format. Although there are a few different categories of grid systems, there are no strict rules on what can or cannot be a grid. It’s up to you. Any guides that help you shape the final design is okay. Relevant for us is how the grid is such a strict mathematical concept. It’s perfect for manipu

title: Eddie Opara
body_head: Eddie Opara Pentagram Eddie Opara New York Eddie Opara was born in Wandsworth, London in 1972. He studied graphic design at the London College of Printing and Yale University, where he received his MFA in 1997. He began his career as a designer at ATG and Imaginary Forces and worked as a senior designer/art director at 2×4 before establishing his own studio, The Map Office, in 2005. body_head: Bait Pentagram Bait follows Shah, played by Riz Ahmed, a struggling British-Pakistani actor whose unexpected, last-shot audition to play James Bond throws his and his family’s life into chaos. Developers and manufacturers will no longer be in the dark for upcoming firmware updates; by making a preview available, Goog
body_tail: rive on your phone, we've got a few pictures and a video to tide you over. title: About | Vignelli Center | RIT
body_head: About | Vignelli Center | RIT RIT Logo with Text About About The Vignelli Center for Design Studies is a hub of research, education, and creative inspiration that houses over 750,000 artifacts across all fields of design. Iconic works by Lella and Massimo Vignelli are featured at the heart of our collection and their legacy forms the foundation of design excellence and innovation that the Vignelli Center celebrates today.
